summary: Create GitHub Actions workflow to build and test loanflow-parent multi-module project
description:
No CI workflow currently builds or tests backend code. The only existing workflow is <.github/workflows/pr-checks.yml>, which validates PR title format only.

The <backend/loanflow-parent/pom.xml> is a Maven multi-module aggregator that manages three modules in reactor order: loanflow-common, gateway-service, and loan-service. Running mvn clean verify from the parent directory builds all modules in dependency order and executes tests.

This story creates <.github/workflows/loanflow-parent-ci.yml> that triggers on push and pull_request events scoped to the backend source tree. The workflow must:
- Set up Java 17 with Maven dependency caching
- Run the full reactor build from <backend/loanflow-parent/> using mvn clean verify
- Upload Surefire test reports as a build artifact for inspection on failure

The loan-service includes an H2 in-memory database dependency and a @SpringBootTest context loads test. The workflow must run cleanly against the H2 test datasource without requiring external infrastructure.

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Workflow triggers on push to backend paths
acceptanceCriteria.given: a developer pushes a commit that modifies any file under backend/loanflow-parent/, backend/loanflow-common/, backend/loan-service/, or backend/gateway-service/
acceptanceCriteria.when: the push lands on main or a development/** branch
acceptanceCriteria.then: the loanflow-parent-ci workflow starts and runs the full reactor build

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Workflow triggers on pull request to backend paths
acceptanceCriteria.given: a pull request is opened or updated with changes under the backend/ source tree
acceptanceCriteria.when: the PR targets main or a development/** branch
acceptanceCriteria.then: the workflow runs and its status is reported on the pull request checks

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Reactor build compiles and tests all modules
acceptanceCriteria.given: the workflow runs mvn clean verify from backend/loanflow-parent/
acceptanceCriteria.when: all source files are valid and tests pass
acceptanceCriteria.then: loanflow-common, gateway-service, and loan-service are all compiled and tested in dependency order with a zero exit code

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Test results are available after a failure
acceptanceCriteria.given: one or more tests fail during the workflow run
acceptanceCriteria.then: Surefire XML reports are uploaded as a build artifact that can be downloaded from the GitHub Actions run summary

tasks.description:
Create the workflow file at <.github/workflows/loanflow-parent-ci.yml> with the following structure:

```
name: Loan Service CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - 'development/**'
    paths:
      - 'backend/loanflow-parent/**'
      - 'backend/loanflow-common/**'
      - 'backend/loan-service/**'
      - 'backend/gateway-service/**'
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
    paths:
      - 'backend/loanflow-parent/**'
      - 'backend/loanflow-common/**'
      - 'backend/loan-service/**'
      - 'backend/gateway-service/**'

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test (loanflow-parent reactor)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Java 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'
          cache: 'maven'

      - name: Build and test all parent modules
        working-directory: backend/loanflow-parent
        run: ./mvnw clean verify

      - name: Upload Surefire test reports
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: surefire-reports
          path: '**/target/surefire-reports/*.xml'
          if-no-files-found: ignore
```

tasks.summary: Verify Maven wrapper exists in loanflow-parent
tasks.description: Confirm that <backend/loanflow-parent/mvnw> exists and is executable. If it is missing, generate it by running mvn wrapper:wrapper -Dmaven=3.9.x from <backend/loanflow-parent/> and commit the wrapper files alongside the workflow. The workflow uses ./mvnw so the wrapper must be present.

tasks.summary: Verify loan-service @SpringBootTest runs cleanly on H2
tasks.description: Run the existing test in <backend/loan-service/src/test/java/com/loanflow/loanservice/LoanServiceApplicationTests.java> locally against the H2 datasource to confirm the context loads without requiring MySQL. If the datasource URL in <backend/loan-service/src/main/resources/application.yaml> points to MySQL, add a test-scoped <backend/loan-service/src/test/resources/application.yaml> that overrides the datasource to H2 in-memory so CI does not need a running database.

tasks.summary: Validate workflow runs end-to-end on a feature branch
tasks.description: Push a trivial change (e.g., a comment update) to a path covered by the workflow triggers and confirm the GitHub Actions run completes green. Check that the Surefire artifact appears in the run summary. Verify the job name appears in the PR checks list so it is visible to reviewers.
